note: Surface-completeness triage for Uniswap Universal Router v1 mainnet original deployment. User-facing execute entrypoints are COVER; collectRewards is COVER as opaque Unknown; AMM callback is infra-only and EXCLUDE.

0x709a1cc2.name: collectRewards
0x709a1cc2.reason: user-facing LooksRare rewards claim with opaque bytes payload; manifest preserves calldata as Unknown rather than forcing an inaccurate rewards ActionBody

0x24856bc3.name: execute
0x24856bc3.reason: user AMM/action command stream without deadline; decoded by opcode_stream_dispatch manifest

0x3593564c.name: execute
0x3593564c.reason: user AMM/action command stream with deadline; decoded by opcode_stream_dispatch manifest

0xfa461e33.name: uniswapV3SwapCallback
0xfa461e33.reason: infra callback invoked by pools during swaps; not a pre-sign user entrypoint
